rdf:Description.dc:publisher: The University of Manchester Library University Press, The John Rylands Research Institute and Library, The University of Manchester

oa:Annotation.lawd:hasName: James Ludovic Lindsay, 26th Earl of Crawford (1847-1913)

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: History of the Archangel St Michael
Homily of Demetrius, Patriarch of Alexandria
Appearance of St Michael to Joshua
Miracle performed for Dorotheus and Theopista, who Found 300 Golden Thalers in a Fish
Miracle of the Three Children in the Furnance
Homiliy of John Bishop of Aksun
Miracle for this festival: a rich peasant who became poor recovers his wealth through the intervention of St Michael
How Jacob Was Succoured by St Michael
Homily by John, Bishop of Aksum
Miracle for this festival: a man who was helping the poor and was paralysed recovers his health through the intervention of St Michael
How St Michael appeared to Sampson
Miracle for this festival: a rich charitable woman is cured of elephantiasis by St Michael
How St Michael Appeared to Balaam
Miracle for this festival: a Christian whose hands and feet withered because of an act of perjury is cured by St Micahel
How St Michael Delivered Jeremiah the Prophet from Prison
Miracle for this festival: cure of a Jew suffering from leprosy by St Michael
How St Michael Was Sent to Habakkuk the Prophet
Miracle for this festival: St Michael cures a demoniac in church
How the Temple of Alexandria Became St Michael's Church.
Miracle for this festival: St Michael cures a blind man.
How St Michael Was Sent to Sennacherib
Homily by Epiphanius the Orthodox, Bishop of Cyprus.
Miracle for this festival: a poor peasant finds treasure in a fish
How St Michael Was Sent to Constantine and Helped Him Achieve Victory
How St Michael Was Sent to Isaiah the Prophet
Miracle for this festival: Egyptian sailors are saved by St Michael from a storm at sea
How St Michael was sent to Samuel to order him to go to Jesse of Bethlehem
